raw_consumer_statement:
My credit card company is Citibank. There were daily charges for around {$400.00} - {$700.00} on my statement. I have had this credit card for many years. The company listed on the statement is XXXX XXXX XXXX. From my research is looks to be a non profit that connects young wealth for society impact and the XXXX. 

I called and disputed the charges and they sent me a new credit card. Thereafter they report my non payment to the credit bureau and with no communication - I went online and they refused to credit the twenty three ( 23 ) fraudulent charges- they have never previously appear on my credit card statements.
